case_brief.problem_summary: Generate isomorphic, easier, and harder follow-up practice variants for x^2 - 5x + 6 = 0.
case_brief.problem_text: Generate isomorphic, easier, and harder follow-up practice variants for x^2 - 5x + 6 = 0.
case_brief.variant_request: Generate isomorphic, easier, and harder follow-up practice variants for x^2 - 5x + 6 = 0.

changes: Replaced the linear coefficient -5 with -7 and constant term 6 with 12 while maintaining monic quadratic form and integer roots
variants.intent: To practice identical factoring method with different numerical values
variants.coach_note: Focus on finding two numbers that multiply to 12 and add to -7

changes: Used smaller coefficients (-3 and 2) with simpler integer roots (1 and 2)
variants.intent: To build confidence with minimal calculation steps
variants.coach_note: Emphasize that roots are consecutive small integers

design_notes: Isomorphic variant preserves exact problem structure (monic quadratic) with different numbers
Easier variant uses smallest possible positive integer roots to reduce cognitive load
Harder variant introduces non-monic quadratic while maintaining factorability to extend core skill
